name: C-Corporation NOL Offset Against Built-In Gains Tax

eligibility.description: Applies to S corporations that were formerly C corporations and have recognized built-in gains during the 5-year recognition period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an S corporation to use Net Operating Loss (NOL) carryforwards from its previous years as a C corporation to offset the Section 1374 built-in gains tax.
